hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); try { const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const f=d.tool_response?.filePath || d.tool_input?.file_path; if (f) cp.spawnSync('npx', ['prettier', '--write', f], { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { }" 2>/dev/null || true
